_publications._publicationTitle: ERK inhibition rescues defects in fate specification of Nf1-deficient neural progenitors and brain abnormalities.

_contextSnippet: Nf1 conditional bi-allelic inactivation caused a 10-15% increase in the size of cerebral cortical surface area...Nf1 inactivation caused a significant increase in the thickness of the CC
details: Caused 10-15% increase in cerebral cortical surface area and significant increase in corpus callosum thickness at all three SVZ-associated positions
